snippet: Shanghai-based neutral atom quantum computing startup Zhongqi Wuliang, spun out from CAS SIOM, to unveil the world first data-center-deployable quantum computer concept at WAIC 2026.

title: JD.com Enters Embodied AI: First RoboBase Robot Facility Breaks Ground in Guangzhou

title: 478x Faster Than NVIDIA A100: Peking University and CAS Neuromorphic Chip Published in Science
